text:
すさまじい数ですね……
何が目的でこれほどの……

間もなく、『テミス』内部の
迎撃システムが再起動します！

優先的に情報を回しますので
有効活用して、敵の殲滅を
お願いします！

There are hordes of them.
What are they after with such numbers?

The Themis internal interception system will
reboot shortly!

You'll have priority access to the data.
Utilize it effectively to eradicate the enemies!
